criteria.text: Year selector on connect: user selects the year a workbook represents; the year is sent to POST /api/reports/connection and persisted with the connection (location + year only, never cell values)
Overwrite warning: if a workbook for the selected year is already connected, the UI confirms before replacing (no silent overwrite); confirm replaces that years connection, cancel leaves it unchanged

YoY appears with two years: current-year + prior-year workbooks connected -> /api/reports attaches yearAgo (current vs prior) and the Reports page shows the YoY column/%; only one year -> no YoY (unchanged)
Year-keyed selection: with multiple years connected, latest year = current source, next-latest = prior-year (YoY) source; connecting/replacing one year does not disturb another
PHI-safe connection audit: a connect/replace records item reference + year + outcome, never the share-URL/token or cell values
Backward-compatible contract: year is additive on POST and GET reports connected year(s); existing single-current-workbook flow preserved; connect UI updated in lockstep
Offline gate: synthetic fixtures (two per-year workbooks) pin year-keyed persistence, overwrite guard, and YoY wiring with no network/creds; no real names committed
